E.C.U Documentation
Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

Fénix 5.1

OBD Information

Protocol: ISO8
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 7A
Func Name: Injection

Requests

[
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "610001",
    "name": "Commande actuateur",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Nombre de cycle de commande ON-OFF": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Numéro de l actuateur": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "400301",
    "name": "Config BVA",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ]
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "400300",
    "name": "Config BVM",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ]
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "400220",
    "name": "Decr régime",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ]
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "4101810000",
    "name": "Définition trame N°2 Etudes",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Adresse du paramètre": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Longueur du paramètre": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Place du paramètre dans la réponse": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "400210",
    "name": "Incr régime",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ]
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "46",
    "name": "RAZ des apprentissages",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ]
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "45",
    "name": "RAZ flags de pannes",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ]
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "21",
    "name": "Requete generique",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Service": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Echo Service": {
        "firstbyte": 1,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 13,
    "sentbytes": "3150",
    "name": "Trame N° 1 APV - identification",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "copie2 de BV": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "copie2 de Définition de la configuration du logiciel": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "copie2 de FLGPP9": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },
      "copie2 de Moteur": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "copie2 de Nombre de cylindres": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "copie2 de Numéro de calibration du logiciel": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "copie2 de Numéro de version du logiciel": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "copie2 de Numéro du fournisseur": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "copie2 de Numéro du programme": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "copie2 de Numéro RENAULT du calculateur": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "copie2 de Panne présente absence de PMH": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "copie2 de Panne présente capteur cible inversé": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },

        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },

      },

        "firstbyte": 13,

        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },

        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },

        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "copie2 de Type injection": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      }
    }

  {
    "minbytes": 25,
    "sentbytes": "3351",
    "name": "Trame N° 2 Production -controles statiques et pann",
    "deny_sds": [
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {

      "Valeur de RCO théorique pour la régulation ralenti": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
